name: United States
summary: Day 79 of Hormuz blockade (Sunday). **KINETIC PREPARATION POSTURE HARDENS — NYT REPORTS 'MOST INTENSE PREPARATIONS YET' TO RENEW STRIKES ON IRAN 'AS SOON AS NEXT WEEK' (REPORTED, two Middle Eastern officials per NYT national security desk).** NYT scoop (Friday May 15 / Saturday May 16) details two options: (i) commando operations to extract nuclear material believed buried under rubble at struck nuclear sites — 'thousands of supporting forces to create a perimeter,' US officials acknowledged the operation 'would risk several casualties' and likely engage Iranian ground troops; (ii) ground forces to seize Kharg Island (handles up to 90% of Iranian oil exports). Amplified by Times of Israel May 16 liveblog, Jerusalem Post 'US-Israel Iran attacks could resume next week' (article 896353), Gulf News 'Operation Epic Fury 2.0,' Fox News 'Next US move on Iran: Seize Kharg Island,' CNN Politics 'Trump returns from China with no Iran breakthrough — and a decision to make' (Pentagon hawks vs Vance-diplomacy track explicitly described). **NO on-record Pentagon/White House confirmation of operation planning.** Iran's countermove already visible (REPORTED — single-source US intel chain via NYT): Iran has moved additional military personnel and air defenses to Kharg Island in recent weeks — operational preparation on both sides. **Trump's posture HARDENED publicly Sunday morning IST**: Truth Social 'It Was The Calm Before the Storm' AI-generated graphic of Trump + US Navy admiral with stormy waters and Iranian-flagged ship (CONFIRMED RHETORIC); second post showed animation of US warship targeting Iranian-flag aircraft with Trump's voice 'Okay, we have it in our sight. Fire!' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC). **The post-summit reversal pattern has now hardened from rhetoric into REPORTED military preparation — the kinetic axis is materially closer to firing than 48 hours ago.** **NPR ABSENCE on the preparation story through Saturday is itself a signal** (NPR's caution + NYT's commitment suggests the story is real but at the edge of what's publicly defensible). **PARALLEL DIPLOMATIC TRACK INTENSIFIES (CONFIRMED ACTION):** Pakistani Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi arrived Tehran Saturday May 16 on 2-day official visit explicitly described in Pakistani official communications as 'to facilitate' US-Iran peace talks. No US administration response published over the weekend; US side will surface in coming 48 hours. **Markets closed Sunday — operative prices are Friday May 15 closes.** Monday May 18 close above $108 Brent = 2-session-sustain rule met = StanChart $130-145 path activates. **PRIOR (May 16):** TRUMP IMMEDIATELY REVERSED POST-SUMMIT — TRUTH SOCIAL 'MILITARY DECIMATION OF IRAN TO BE CONTINUED' + HANNITY 'I AM NOT GOING TO BE MUCH MORE PATIENT' + DETROIT NEWS 'DID NOT ASK CHINA FOR ANY FAVOURS' (directly contradicting his Wednesday Fox claim Xi offered to broker peace)**; and on **Saturday May 16 Trump confirmed he sent Iran a NEW NUCLEAR PROPOSAL LETTER demanding full dismantling + halt to all enrichment + end of proxy support within 2-month compliance window** (CONFIRMED letter sent — Trump confirmed; CLAIMED letter contents — RedState May 15 + Wikipedia 2025-2026 negotiations summary; primary text not yet surfaced). The Thursday joint statement produced **ZERO operational follow-through** — no HEU-custodian framework, no Chinese security guarantees, no verification architecture. **Three publicly-visible inconsistent US positions in 48 hours**: (a) Wednesday Fox News Xi offered to broker Iran peace + soybean/Boeing commitments; (b) Thursday joint statement strategic-stability framework + Iran no-nuclear-weapon + Hormuz must remain open; (c) Thursday/Friday Truth Social 'decimation to be continued' + Hannity 'not patient' + Detroit News 'didn't ask for favours.' Yesterday's 'Trump fourth reversal' trigger that already fired is now reinforced as a **fifth high-profile reversal** — pattern structurally embedded in cycle (Fortune April 21: 'Trump officials whisper that his Truth Social posts about Iran risk killing peace talks'). **WARSH FED CHAIR TRANSITION EFFECTIVE MAY 16** — Senate confirmed 54-45 on May 13 (CONFIRMED — CNN + NPR + ABA + C-SPAN + WaPo + CNBC); replaces Powell today. Warsh wants to shrink balance sheet and rely on traditional rate tool; 'Investors now expecting Fed to keep rate unchanged for the rest of the year — or even raise rates if inflation worsens' (Yahoo Finance May 13). Trump allies warning Warsh on rate cuts (WaPo May 14). **APRIL PPI +1.4% m/m / +6% YoY (BLS May 13) = BIGGEST SINGLE-MONTH JUMP SINCE DECEMBER 2022**; Core PPI +1% (vs 0.4% est); nearly 60% of rise was in services; energy at the root. Combined with April CPI 3.8% YoY (May 12, three-year high), the Fed easing path is closed indefinitely. **US MARKETS PRICED THE STAGFLATION REGIME SHIFT CLEANLY ON MAY 15**: S&P -1.24% to 7,408.50 (off Thursday's 7,501.24 record), NASDAQ -1.54% to 26,225.14, Dow -1.07% lost 50K handle (-537.29 pts to 49,526.17), 10Y Treasury +14bp to **4.595% (highest since Feb 2025)**, 30Y +11bp to **5.121% (highest since May 2025)**; Bloomberg labelled it 'the worst weekly Treasury rout in a year.' Tech sold off hard (Intel -6%, AMD -5.7%, Micron -6.6%, Nvidia -4.4%). Silver -9.1% to $77.16, Gold -2.6% to $4,555.80, Copper -4.8%, Platinum -4.9%, Uranium URA -4.9%, Aluminum -2.6%. WTI booked +11% weekly to ~$106; Brent +3.3% to $109.26 (first sustained close above $108 since the trigger was added). **The paper-equity leg of the cycle-extreme bifurcation reversed within 24 hours** — paper-equity capitulated, yields surged, tech leadership cracked simultaneously with the Trump-Xi joint statement producing no operational follow-on; the 'one side resolves violently within 5-10 sessions' framing yesterday is now Day 1 of resolution toward crisis confirmation, not peace. **VIX still only 18.43 (+6.8%) — vol complex has NOT capitulated** (sub-20 range; NVDA earnings May 20 keeps vol-sellers active; systematic dealers still long gamma above 7,400 SPX). VIX >22 sustained 2 sessions = regime confirmation. **ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE EXTENDED 45 DAYS to ~2026-06-29 with Pentagon-led security track to begin May 29** (CONFIRMED — State Dept primary, Bloomberg, PBS, Times of Israel) — State Dept Tommy Pigott called talks 'highly productive'; substantively elevates process from State-led ambassadorial to Pentagon-led security architecture. **B1 SAUDI ARABIA FLOATED MIDDLE EAST NON-AGGRESSION PACT WITH IRAN MODELLED ON 1975 HELSINKI ACCORDS** (FT primary May 14, amplified across MEE, Haaretz, Arab News). EU institutions explicitly backing the proposal. Israeli and US public stance 'unclear.' UAE-Saudi divergence flagged as complication. Trump's 2-month letter window is now **the binding decision-tree input for the next 60 days** (~2026-07-16 ceiling). PRIOR (May 15): **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 2 PRODUCED JOINT STATEMENT THAT IRAN 'CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON' AND STRAIT OF HORMUZ 'MUST REMAIN OPEN'** (CONFIRMED — ToI May 15 liveblog primary, CBS, CNN Politics, China MFA readout). Joint statement also committed to 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework for the next three years. Xi additionally opposed 'militarization of the Strait' and any effort to 'charge a toll' for its use. China MFA readout preserves Iran's 'legitimate right to peaceful use of nuclear energy' escape valve in language. **Trump's Fox News follow-on assertions (CLAIMED only, single source, NOT in joint statement text)**: Xi offered to broker peace with Iran, won't supply Iran military equipment, will buy soybeans/oil/LNG + 200 Boeing 737s — analyst skepticism widespread (China's existing soybean appetite limited by cheap Brazilian alternatives per Reuters). **TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK NOW DAY 8 POST-CLOSE WITHOUT STRIKE ORDER**; the May 15-20 decision corridor remains open. Pentagon 'Operation Sledgehammer' contingency naming has not been operationally invoked. Vance's softer 'still making progress' framing has not been disputed by White House. **A3 STATE DEPARTMENT 'PRODUCTIVE AND POSITIVE' ON WASHINGTON ISRAEL-LEBANON TALKS DAY 2** (Haaretz May 15 liveblog primary). Karam-Dermer bilateral closing today; April-23-extended ceasefire actually expires Sunday May 17 (NOT May 15 as yesterday's brief recorded — date correction). Reuters/Manila Times pre-positioning expectations for an extended-political-process announcement. **A4 LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED DAY 2 OF 14: Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, 20, Golani Brigade 12th Battalion killed by Hezbollah mortar fire May 14** — stress-tests Washington architecture under State Department sponsorship. **Risk-asset complex hit complacency cycle high May 14**: VIX 17.26 (down from 17.87), S&P 500 / NASDAQ Composite / Dow Jones all closed at record highs (S&P above 7,500 first time at record, Dow reclaimed 50,000) on a day with two new kinetic incidents (Hui Chuan + Haj Ali), an Israeli KIA inside the Litani trigger window, Brent +1.11% to $106.89 (refusing to fall on summit), VLCC TD3C confirmed at $467,408/day via Baltic Exchange Week 17. **This is the cleanest paper-physical bifurcation reading of the cycle: paper assets pricing structural-stability + AI-cycle dominance; physical complex (oil, tanker rates, kinetic incidents, SPR diplomacy) pricing intact-blockade + escalation-tail-risk. One side resolves violently within 5-10 sessions.** **April CPI 3.8% YoY + April PPI +1.4% m/m closed near-term Fed easing door**; Morgan Stanley moved rate-cut call to 2027. US 10Y yield 4.46% (-0.4% 1D); Trump SPR emergency exchange actively executing (53.3 Mbbl awarded to Exxon/Trafigura/Marathon, 172M total). Saudi MFA tacit-acknowledgment language (Reuters): senior official asked directly about covert strikes did NOT address the question, instead 'reaffirm Saudi Arabia's consistent position advocating de-escalation' — closest thing to tacit acknowledgment; Reuters added timing detail that the informal Saudi-Iran de-escalation 'took effect in the week before Washington and Tehran agreed to a ceasefire on April 7' (Saudi exit predated broader US-Iran ceasefire by ~one week, suggesting Saudi exit was the leading edge of broader ceasefire architecture). **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 1 IN BEIJING — TRUMP PUBLICLY OPENED HEU-VIA-CHINA CUSTODIAN DOOR**: 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). Material policy signal: contradicts pre-departure 'doesn't need Xi' line, substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian (US officials had reportedly ruled out Russia-as-custodian per multiple May reports). Xi opened with 'partners rather than rivals' / 'Thucydides Trap' / wants 2026 'landmark year' — language designed to lower temperature. Framework still stalled on substance — Iran's HEU return-clause demand and Trump's text-light approach unchanged — but public custodian door now re-opened in different jurisdiction. **VP VANCE MAY 13 PUBLICLY SAID US NEGOTIATORS 'STILL MAKING PROGRESS' WITH IRAN DESPITE 'UNSATISFYING RESPONSES'** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Haaretz live May 13, The Hill, CNN). Softer line than Trump's pre-departure 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / massive life support / 1% chance of living' framing — cleanest publicly-visible US-internal-administration tone divergence of cycle: Trump pre-Beijing harder, Vance softer. **PENTAGON 'OPERATION SLEDGEHAMMER' CONTINGENCY NAMING** (REPORTED — NBC News May 12 primary; JPost, Mediaite, Yahoo, WION, ZeroHedge secondary) — White House officials told NBC: any new military combat operations would be conducted under a new name and operation; 'Sledgehammer is not the only name under consideration.' Bureaucratic preparation for post-summit decision window May 15-20; structurally a War Powers Act 60-day-clock-reset workaround that would argue Operation Sledgehammer is structurally separate from Operation Epic Fury (Feb 28 onward). Leak surfaced PRE-summit = telegraphs to Tehran that post-summit kinetic option is being administratively pre-staged. NBC (not Fox) breaking the leak suggests anonymous-Pentagon-source leak through Democrat-aligned outlet, not WH-controlled Fox leak. Combined picture: Vance keeps diplomatic door, Pentagon prepares kinetic option, Trump positions himself in middle with HEU-via-China lever. **B3 EIA MAY STEO PUBLISHED MAY 12 — Brent ~$106 May-June, $89 4Q26, $79 2027 average** (CONFIRMED EIA primary; corrects yesterday's TASS-reported $94.85 which was calendar-year 2026 average — both data points correct on different metrics; the path is explicit: $106 near-term moving to $89 by year-end as Middle East supply rises). EIA additionally reported (Bloomberg May 13): Hormuz oil flows fell **nearly 30% in Q1 2026** = official-data confirmation of the Lloyd's List operational tracker series. EIA assumes Hormuz effectively closed until late May, shipping picks up June. Brent retraced from $108.05 (May 13 close, single-session breach) to $105.68 (May 14 morning) = $108-110 trigger zone breach was SINGLE-SESSION, NOT sustained. StanChart $130-145 cascade remains DORMANT. **A10 REUTERS NOW AMPLIFIES SAUDI-STRIKES STORY (was Newsweek/WSJ-only cluster yesterday)** — Reuters May 12-13 cited 'two Western officials briefed on the matter and two Iranian officials' (Reuters primary; carried by US News, Spokesman, Times of Israel, Haaretz, Kathmandu Post, Pravda, BusinessWorld Online). MATERIALLY STRENGTHENS basis from one-cluster to multi-cluster. Reuters adds new intelligence: 'Saudi Arabia made Iran aware of the strikes and this was followed by intensive diplomatic engagement and Saudi threats to retaliate further, which led to an understanding between the two countries to de-escalate.' Riyadh-Tehran channel now reads as 'kinetic strikes followed by de-escalation understanding' — structurally different from UAE-Iran trajectory (UAE remains active third combatant per WSJ). Saudi-Iran/UAE-Iran trajectories BIFURCATING. Saudi/Iran institutionally silent — Saudi-strikes remain REPORTED, not CONFIRMED. **A7 IDF ANNOUNCED MAY 13 'WEEKLONG RAID' BEYOND LITANI RIVER NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH led by Golani Brigade's Reconnaissance Unit** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 13). Killed ~15 Hezbollah operatives past 24h, ~45 Hezbollah targets total 24h. State Department CONFIRMED primary: third round US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks Washington May 14-15, agenda includes 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah' — material structural anchoring; April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires May 15, exactly as talks finish (choreographed). PRIOR (May 13): Pre-departure tone materially HARDER than May 6-10 pulse-test phase which had floated cooperation language around Chinese leverage on Tehran. Al Jazeera + NPR led with 'doesn't need Xi'; PBS NewsHour + CSIS framed both leaders as 'intent on keeping the Iran war from overshadowing the summit' = itself a downgrade of last weekend's Chatham House 'can progress be made on Iran' framing. Delegation of 12+ US CEOs travelling — Tim Cook, Elon Musk — centre of gravity on trade-and-tariffs, not Iran. STRUCTURAL READ: 1-week clock Day 6/7 expires May 14 while Trump is in Xi's anteroom; rules out an immediate kinetic order but public stance going in is uncompromising rather than open. **A2 APRIL CPI 3.8% YoY (BLS RELEASE MAY 12) — THREE-YEAR HIGH, HIGHEST SINCE MAY 2023, +0.6% MoM matching expectations; CORE +2.8% YoY / +0.4% MoM (highest monthly since Jan 2025); ENERGY contributed >40% of headline gain (+3.8% MoM, +17.9% YoY); GASOLINE +28.4% YoY. BLS flagged inflation is 'a problem beyond the Iran war impacts.'** S&P 500 closed -0.29% May 12 at 7,392 (off May 11's 7,412.84 record); NASDAQ followed. **FIRST CYCLE INFLATION PRINT TO FULLY REFLECT OIL PASS-THROUGH** — directly closes the door on near-term Fed easing; US 10Y bid at 4.46% (+1.2% 1D, +5bps); real-yield channel tightens; gold-vs-uranium decoupling reinforced (gold -1.22% May 12 to $4,678; URA still bid). **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury formally signalled prepared secondary sanctions on five Chinese teapot refineries (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); China MOFCOM May 2 Prohibition Order under Blocking Rules = FIRST FORMAL CHINESE LEGAL COUNTERMEASURE TO US SANCTIONS** (CONFIRMED Treasury primary + MOFCOM order text + Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie legal corroboration). Sanctions architecture shifting from 'secondary risk' to 'explicit legal collision.' **A10 NEWSWEEK CITING WSJ + 2 WESTERN OFFICIALS + 2 IRANIAN OFFICIALS: SAUDI ARABIA LAUNCHED SECRET STRIKES AGAINST IRAN IN LATE MARCH ('tit-for-tat retaliation when Saudi was hit') — REPORTED, on top of yesterday's UAE-Lavan WSJ disclosure** (April 8 Mirage 2000-9 attack on Lavan Island refinery). Iran has fired >2,800 missiles/drones at UAE territory cumulatively (more than at any other country); one UAE Lavan-response strike reportedly coordinated with Israel. Saudi has not publicly acknowledged; Iran silent on Saudi disclosure; Al Hadath (Saudi) ran editorial distance on UAE story but not Saudi-strikes; US-mainstream amplification slower than UAE-Lavan story (Newsweek primary, ToI+Middle East Eye secondary, mainstream wires lagging — consistent with slow-walking Gulf-ally embarrassment). The Gulf-alignment graph now requires Saudi to move from 'OPEC+/balancing/underwriter' toward partial kinetic participant — structural re-encoding of entire Gulf row. **A13 SOUTH KOREA GOVERNMENT FORMALLY CONFIRMED HMM NAMU MAY 4 INCIDENT WAS EXTERNAL STRIKE — investigation found TWO unidentified airborne objects struck stern at ~1 min intervals ('double-tap' drone pattern, first near rudder, second engine room); mine + torpedo formally ruled out. FM Cho Hyun May 13 (Korea Herald): 'too early to determine who was responsible,' 'various actors, including militias, could have been involved.' Opposition People Power Party publicly criticised government for omitting Iran from initial findings; Seoul institutionally maintaining 'various actors' hedge.** **A7 IDF GROUND TROOPS CROSSED THE LITANI RIVER MAY 12 NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH (~10 KM from Israel-Lebanon border) = FIRST PUBLICLY-ACKNOWLEDGED ISRAELI GROUND CROSSING OF LITANI SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 12). IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' = most senior IDF officer publicly declaring ceasefire dead. CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim still NOT corroborated Western-side; remains REPORTED-CLAIMED. **NO 2ND RED SEA INCIDENT in 7-day window from May 11 Hodeidah (Day 2 of 7, still single unclaimed); NO 2ND STRIKE inside Qatari EEZ; PROJECT FREEDOM PAUSE HOLDS Day 8; CENTCOM redirect tally unchanged at 61; NO 5TH DISABLED TANKER. NO TRUMP STRIKE ORDER post-rejection — Situation Room weighed Monday, no action ordered before Beijing departure. NO FORMAL RUSSIA HEU CUSTODIAN ANNOUNCEMENT — May 18 Trump 21-day window from Putin-Araghchi meeting; Day 14 of 21. NO MOJTABA AUDIO/VIDEO — Day 6 silence.** Operationally consistent with US pulling kinetic-decision space into post-Beijing window (May 15-20). Force posture: USS Bush + USS Lincoln on station (2 CSGs), 20+ warships, 200+ aircraft, 15,000 troops. USS Gerald R. Ford transiting Gibraltar westbound (Day 322); USS Boxer ARG + 11th MEU imminent arrival; George Washington CSG departed Yokosuka May 10. Footprint HOLDING/REINFORCING. Markets: S&P 500 -0.29% off May 11 record on CPI absorption; NASDAQ followed; VIX FELL to 17.99 (-2.1% 1D) into 1-week clock close + Litani crossing + 90% rhetoric + Saudi-strikes disclosure — markets reading Trump-in-Beijing = forced kinetic pause; gold +0.8% only on 3-year-high CPI print (real-yield channel competing with safe-haven bid). Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~22-27% (DOWN modestly — Beijing forces 48h pause + Iran kinetic ceiling holding); extended-economic-warfare ~50-55% (UP — CPI confirms macro pass-through, sanctions architecture deepening); negotiated-resolution ~18-23% (DOWN — Iran synchronised hardening on nuclear file + state media). PRIOR-DAY CONTEXT (May 12): Iran delivered formal multi-page written response via Pakistan May 10-11; Trump Truth Social late May 10 + Oval Office May 11 ('1% chance of living' doctor analogy; 'playing games for 47 years'). **TRUMP CONVENED WHITE HOUSE SITUATION ROOM MAY 11 WITH VANCE / RUBIO / HEGSETH / RATCLIFFE / CJCS CAINE / WITKOFF — RENEWED MILITARY ACTION EXPLICITLY UNDER DISCUSSION** (restart 'Project Freedom' naval escort OR resume airstrikes on 'remaining 25%' of designated Iran targets); one official: 'Trump is going to hit them a bit'; **NO ORDERS ISSUED** (REPORTED via Axios primary multi-amplified — CNN, ToI, Wash Times, CNBC). **TRUMP CHINA VISIT MAY 14-15 CONFIRMED — Trump departs May 13 afternoon for Beijing summit with Xi; Iran on agenda; per Bloomberg, a major Iran military decision is unlikely before Trump returns from Beijing May 15-16 — creates FORCED PAUSE WINDOW exactly when 1-week clock closes May 14.** (CONFIRMED — Bloomberg primary, SCMP, PBS, AJ, CNBC). **B7 NEW OFAC SANCTIONS WAVE MAY 11-12 — Treasury sanctioned 12 entities (4 HK, 4 UAE, 1 Oman) + 3 individuals over Iran→China oil chain via IRGC Shaid Purja'fari oil HQ + Golden Globe Turkey-cover company; builds on July 2025 Golden Globe designations; Bessent: continue using sanctions to deprive Iran funding; May 12 designations targeted Iranian nuclear research with military applications** (CONFIRMED — Treasury primary). **A11 CENTCOM PRECISION TALLY 58→61 REDIRECTED + 4 IRANIAN-FLAGGED TANKERS DISABLED COUNT HOLDS** (3 incremental redirects in 48h = below early-May pace, consistent with Project Freedom remaining paused since May 5/6); CENTCOM separately cites 'more than 70 tankers' prevented cumulatively + '$13 billion in oil that will never reach market.' Force posture: USS Bush + USS Lincoln on station (2 CSGs), 20+ warships, 200+ aircraft, 15,000 troops. **USS Gerald R. Ford transiting Gibraltar westbound (Day 322, home to Norfolk).** USS Boxer ARG + 11th MEU (5,000 Marines/sailors + F-35Bs) imminent arrival. George Washington CSG departed Yokosuka May 10. Footprint HOLDING/REINFORCING despite Ford rotation. Aramco CEO Nasser May 11: 2-5 ships/day Hormuz (vs ~70 pre-war, DETERIORATED from May 10's ~6/day), 100M bbl/week lost, 880M cumulative, market won't normalize until 2027 if disruption persists past mid-June. **VLCC Agios Fanourios I (Iraqi Basra crude bound Vietnam Nghi Son) reversed course back into Gulf of Oman at ~5 knots without crossing US blockade line — visible confidence-collapse signature even for compliant non-Iranian VLCCs** (Bloomberg + gCaptain May 11). **B6 WSJ REVELATION MAY 11: UAE AIR FORCE SECRETLY CARRIED OUT AIRSTRIKES INSIDE IRAN DURING THE WAR, INCLUDING APRIL 8 STRIKE ON LAVAN ISLAND OIL REFINERY USING MIRAGE 2000-9 AIRCRAFT** (55,000 bpd offline months); 'Washington reportedly positively received Abu Dhabi's participation' — UAE moves from passive US host to ONLY third country to join US-Israel kinetic operations against Iran; Saudi by contrast publicly denied airspace use via Al-Hadath May 8 (visibly distancing). **B9 HMM Namu forensics public May 11 — Seoul stopped short of publicly blaming Iran (mine + torpedo ruled out; 2 unidentified aerial objects ~1min apart at stern; engine debris recovered); creates diplomatic friction with Trump, who pre-attributed.** Markets bifurcated: **S&P 500 fresh record close +0.2% / NASDAQ +0.1% / Dow +0.2% — US essentially decouples from war; VIX +6.9% to 18.38 (still 'not panic' vs March crisis-peak 32+); 10Y yield 4.41% (+1.1% 1D)** — vs Indian markets taking the brunt (Sensex -1.1%, Nifty -1.0%, INR ₹95.54 record). US source-tone unified on 'life support' but divergent on blame: WaPo/NPR verbatim language, CNN aggressive ('Trump ties himself in knots' / 'frustrated Trump more seriously thinking of restarting'), Fox 'Iran on full readiness' framing intransigence as cause; WSJ getting WH+Gulf intel access (broke Iran HEU terms + UAE Lavan simultaneously). Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~25-30% (UP on Sit-Room + Netanyahu ceiling); extended-economic-warfare ~45-50% (UP — trinary hardening); negotiated-resolution ~20-25% (DOWN sharply on Trump rejection + Netanyahu ceiling).

active_triggers.condition: US attempts ground invasion of Kharg Island or Iranian territory
US Truth Social or Pentagon-channel statement converting strike plan from 'held' to 'active' OR executing strike
Confirmed Russia uranium-custodian framework agreed by US + Iran within 21 days (by 2026-05-18)
Third US enforcement action against Iran-linked shipping outside Middle East area within 14 days (Tifani+1)

recent_signals.headline: **NYT REPORTS 'MOST INTENSE PREPARATIONS YET' FOR RENEWED US+ISRAELI STRIKES ON IRAN 'AS SOON AS NEXT WEEK' (REPORTED) + TRUMP 'CALM BEFORE THE STORM' TRUTH SOCIAL POSTS (CONFIRMED RHETORIC) + PAKISTAN-NAQVI MEDIATION VISIT (CONFIRMED ACTION) — KINETIC AND DIPLOMATIC TRACKS NOW RUNNING SIMULTANEOUSLY, NOT IN SEQUENCE.** NYT scoop (Friday May 15 / Saturday May 16, citing two Middle Eastern officials) reported Israel and the US are carrying out 'most intense preparations yet to renew attacks on Iran, possibly as soon as next week' — options include (i) commando operations to extract nuclear material believed buried under rubble at struck nuclear sites ('thousands of supporting forces to create a perimeter,' US officials acknowledged 'would risk several casualties' and likely engage Iranian ground troops); (ii) ground forces to seize Kharg Island (handles up to 90% of Iranian oil exports). Amplified by Times of Israel May 16 liveblog, Jerusalem Post 'US-Israel Iran attacks could resume next week' (article 896353), Gulf News 'Operation Epic Fury 2.0,' Fox News 'Next US move on Iran: Seize Kharg Island,' CNN Politics 'Trump returns from China with no Iran breakthrough — and a decision to make' (Pentagon hawks vs Vance-diplomacy track explicitly described). **NO on-record Pentagon/White House confirmation.** Iran's countermove already visible (REPORTED — single-source US intel chain via NYT): Iran has 'laid traps and moved additional military personnel and air defenses to Kharg Island in recent weeks.' **Trump posture hardened publicly Sunday IST**: Truth Social AI-generated graphic 'It Was The Calm Before the Storm' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — ToI May 17 liveblog primary + Ynet + Israel National News + India TV + Egypt Today + IANS + Arab Times + Al Bawaba); second post showed animation of US warship targeting Iranian-flag aircraft with Trump's voice 'Okay, we have it in our sight. Fire!' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC). **Pakistan-Naqvi Tehran visit (CONFIRMED ACTION)**: Pakistani Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi arrived Tehran Saturday May 16 on 2-day official visit explicitly described in Pakistani official communications as 'to facilitate' US-Iran peace talks; received by Iranian Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni (Daily Pakistan + Pakistan Today + BSS News primary). No US administration response published over the weekend. **Souffan Center IntelBrief framing 'Escalate to De-Escalate' at maximum-density expression**: six-pillar Iran architecture + NYT preparation report + Pakistan-Naqvi visit + Trump 'Calm Before the Storm' + Iran-Kharg air-defense reinforcement = both sides escalating to position for de-escalation on favorable terms. **NPR ABSENCE on the preparation story through Saturday is itself a signal** — NPR's caution + NYT's commitment suggests the story is real but at the edge of what's publicly defensible. **Markets closed Sunday — operative prices are Friday May 15 closes.** Monday May 18 close above $108 Brent = 2-session-sustain rule met = StanChart $130-145 path activates; below = trinary band $100-110 holds against the strongest escalation signal of the cycle. **Sadjadpour falsifiability tests both running:** if US strikes commence within 7 days (by May 24), 'rhetoric without action' leg fails; if Iran formally accepts May 16 letter by July 16, multi-track-posture-as-leverage reading fails.
sources: New York Times Friday-Saturday May 15-16 via Times of Israel May 16 liveblog amplification — two Middle Eastern officials attribution
Times of Israel May 16 liveblog 'As Iran talks stall, Israel and US prepping to renew war as soon as next week — report'
Times of Israel May 17 liveblog (Trump posts + IDF Hezbollah update)
Jerusalem Post May 16 article 896353 'US-Israel Iran attacks could resume next week'
Gulf News May 17 'Operation Epic Fury 2.0: US and Israel Weigh Kharg Island Strike, Uranium Seizure Mission'
Fox News 'Next US move on Iran: Seize Kharg Island'
CNN Politics May 16 'Trump returns from China with no Iran breakthrough — and a decision to make'
Trump Truth Social primary (Calm Before the Storm graphic + warship-Iran animation)
Daily Pakistan May 16 'Naqvi in Tehran in Pakistan's push to revive stalled US-Iran Talks' Pakistani primary
Pakistan Today May 16 (two pieces — Naqvi landed in Tehran + Pakistan-Iran reaffirm regional stability)
BSS News 'Pakistani minister arrives in Tehran to facilitate US-Iran peace talks'
Souffan Center May 11 IntelBrief 'Escalate to De-Escalate: Confusing Signals in the U.S.-Iran War' (analytical frame)
recent_signals.verification: NYT preparation report (commando + Kharg ground option + 'as soon as next week') = REPORTED only (two Middle Eastern officials, NYT national security desk; multi-outlet amplification; NO on-record Pentagon/WH confirmation); Iran-Kharg air-defense reinforcement = REPORTED (single-source US intel chain via NYT); Trump 'Calm Before the Storm' Truth Social post = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Trump's own primary account, 7+ outlets); Trump warship-Iran animation 'Okay we have it in our sight, Fire!' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Trump primary); Pakistan-Naqvi Tehran visit = CONFIRMED ACTION (Daily Pakistan + Pakistan Today + BSS News multi-source primary; Iranian Interior Minister received Naqvi publicly); CNN 'decision to make' framing = CONFIRMED RHETORIC framing (CNN primary); NPR absence = CONFIRMED ABSENCE (no NPR preparation-story publication through Saturday — itself a verification signal).

recent_signals.headline: **THREE INDEPENDENT MACRO FORCES COLLIDED IN ONE TAPE ON MAY 15 — PPI SHOCK + WARSH FED TRANSITION + TRUMP-IRAN REVERSAL = STAGFLATION REGIME SHIFT SESSION.** (1) **April PPI +1.4% m/m / +6% YoY (BLS May 13)** = biggest single-month jump since December 2022, Core PPI +1% vs 0.4% est, ~60% of rise was in services, energy at the root; combined with April CPI 3.8% YoY (BLS May 12) closes near-term Fed easing door indefinitely. (2) **Kevin Warsh confirmed by Senate 54-45 on May 13** replacing Powell **effective today May 16**; Warsh wants to shrink balance sheet and rely on traditional rate tool — markets had been pricing dovish-Rieder regime hopium; Yahoo Finance May 13: investors 'now expecting Fed to keep rate unchanged for the rest of the year — or even raise rates if inflation worsens.' Trump allies warning Warsh on rate cuts (WaPo May 14). (3) **Trump immediately reversed post-summit and on Saturday May 16 sent Iran a NEW NUCLEAR ULTIMATUM LETTER demanding full dismantling + halt all enrichment + end proxy support within 2-month compliance** — joint statement produced zero operational follow-through. Composite mechanism: PPI lands → bond yields gap → **10Y +14bp to 4.595% (highest since Feb 2025), 30Y +11bp to 5.121% (highest since May 2025) — 'worst weekly Treasury rout in a year' (Bloomberg)** → DXY +0.4% to 99.27 → gold underperforms on real-yield headwind ($4,564 -1.83%) → equity multiples compress → Trump reversal layered on top → oil rips ($109.26 +3.3%, WTI +4.2%, WTI +11% weekly) → energy stocks bid (XLE +2.4%, Exxon +4.1%), everything else sold. **Crisis vs non-crisis split for S&P -1.2%**: ~0.5% crisis (Trump reversal + Iran ultimatum); ~0.5% rates/Fed (PPI absorption + Warsh transition); ~0.2% sympathy with KOSPI/EM. Crisis component reverses if Iran responds within 2-month window; rates component does not. **VIX only 18.43 (+6.8%)** — vol complex has not capitulated; (a) move was orderly across asset classes; (b) summer ranges typically compress; (c) NVDA earnings May 20 keeps vol-sellers active; (d) systematic dealers still long gamma above 7,400 SPX. **VIX >22 sustained 2 sessions = regime confirmation.** **TRUMP REVERSAL DETAIL**: Within hours of departing China, Truth Social 'the military decimation of Iran is to be continued' (Times of Israel May 15 liveblog primary); Hannity Fox 'I am not going to be much more patient'; Detroit News May 15 'did not ask China for any favours' — directly contradicting his Fox-only Wednesday claim Xi offered to broker peace. **Pattern: three publicly-visible inconsistent positions in 48 hours; this is structurally the FIFTH high-profile Trump reversal in 30 days.** May 16 letter contents (full dismantling + 2-month compliance + halt enrichment + end proxy support) = CLAIMED (secondary RedState + Wikipedia compilation; primary text not surfaced); letter EXISTENCE = CONFIRMED (Trump confirmed). **ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE EXTENDED 45 DAYS** to ~2026-06-29 with **Pentagon-led security track to begin May 29** (CONFIRMED — State Dept primary, Bloomberg, PBS, Times of Israel) — State Dept Tommy Pigott 'highly productive'; substantively elevates process from State-led ambassadorial to Pentagon-led security architecture. The architecture-collapse scenario yesterday warned of has been *deferred, not foreclosed* — Litani-KIA window Day 3 of 14 continues; no second IDF KIA in first 48h. **SAUDI HELSINKI-ACCORDS NON-AGGRESSION PACT PROPOSAL** floated for Iran + regional states (FT May 14 primary, MEE/Haaretz/Arab News amplification), with EU institutions explicitly backing; US public stance 'unclear.' US partisan divergence widening on Trump-Xi: CNN/NYT/Bloomberg/WSJ lead 'no major policy breakthroughs'; Fox amplifies 'decimation' + 'not patient'; CNBC/Bloomberg business desks frame Treasury surge as **inflation-driven not geopolitical** — bipartisan-support framing weakening for first time in cycle.

recent_signals.headline: **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 2 PRODUCED JOINT STATEMENT THAT IRAN 'CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON' AND STRAIT OF HORMUZ 'MUST REMAIN OPEN'** (CONFIRMED — ToI May 15 liveblog primary, CBS, CNN, China MFA readout, Al Jazeera). Both sides committed to 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework guiding next three years; Xi additionally opposed 'militarization of the Strait' and any effort to 'charge a toll' for its use. **China MFA readout preserves Iran's 'legitimate right to peaceful use of nuclear energy' escape valve in language.** **Trump's Fox News follow-on (CLAIMED — single source, NOT in joint statement)**: Xi 'offered to broker peace with Iran,' 'won't supply Iran military equipment,' will buy soybeans/oil/LNG + 200 Boeing 737s — analyst skepticism widespread. **TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 8 POST-CLOSE WITHOUT STRIKE ORDER**; the May 15-20 decision corridor remains open. Pentagon 'Operation Sledgehammer' contingency naming has not been operationally invoked; Vance's 'still making progress' framing has not been disputed by White House. **A3 STATE DEPARTMENT 'PRODUCTIVE AND POSITIVE' ON WASHINGTON ISRAEL-LEBANON TALKS DAY 2 — ceasefire actually expires Sunday May 17 (DATE CORRECTION vs prior brief)**; Reuters/Manila Times pre-positioning expectations for an extended political process announcement. **A4 LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED DAY 2 OF 14: Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, 20, Golani Brigade 12th Battalion killed by Hezbollah mortar fire May 14** — stress-tests the Washington architecture. **Risk-asset complex hit complacency cycle high May 14**: VIX 17.26 (down from 17.87); S&P 500 above 7,500 first time at record; NASDAQ Composite record; Dow Jones reclaimed 50,000; Brent +1.11% to $106.89 (refusing to fall on summit); VLCC TD3C confirmed at $467,408/day via Baltic Exchange Week 17 — cleanest paper-physical bifurcation reading of the cycle, one side resolves violently within 5-10 sessions. **A8 SAUDI MFA TACIT ACKNOWLEDGMENT LANGUAGE** (Reuters): senior official asked directly about covert strikes did NOT address the question, instead 'reaffirm Saudi Arabia's consistent position advocating de-escalation' — closest thing to tacit acknowledgment. Reuters added timing detail: 'informal de-escalation took effect in the week before Washington and Tehran agreed to a ceasefire on April 7' — Saudi-Iran de-escalation predated broader US-Iran ceasefire by ~one week, suggesting Saudi exit was the leading edge of broader ceasefire architecture.
sources: Times of Israel May 15 liveblog (joint statement primary)
Reuters via People News Today (analyst skepticism)
Haaretz May 15 liveblog (State Dept 'productive and positive' primary)
Reuters Saudi MFA non-denial language primary

recent_signals.headline: DAY 76 / TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK CLOSES TODAY (Day 7/7) WITHOUT STRIKE ORDER — forced-pause-via-Beijing OPERATIONALLY VALIDATED. **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 1 IN BEIJING — TRUMP PUBLICLY OPENED HEU-VIA-CHINA CUSTODIAN DOOR**: 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). Contradicts pre-departure 'doesn't need Xi' line; substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian. Xi opened with 'partners rather than rivals' / 'Thucydides Trap' framing / wants 2026 'landmark year.' Framework remains stalled on substance but public custodian door now re-opened in different jurisdiction; Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role. **VP VANCE MAY 13 PUBLICLY: US negotiators 'still making progress' with Iran despite 'unsatisfying responses' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Haaretz May 13, The Hill, CNN)** — softer line than Trump's pre-departure framing. Cleanest publicly-visible US-internal-administration tone divergence: Trump harder pre-Beijing, Vance softer, with Trump's own Beijing-day HEU-via-China shift structurally consistent with softening of May 11 line. **PENTAGON 'OPERATION SLEDGEHAMMER' CONTINGENCY NAMING** (REPORTED — NBC News May 12 primary): WH officials told NBC any new combat operations conducted under new name and operation; 'Sledgehammer not the only name under consideration.' Structural significance: War Powers Act 60-day-clock-reset workaround — renaming would allow administration to argue Sledgehammer is structurally separate from Operation Epic Fury, restarting 60-day clock that requires Congressional authorisation. Pre-summit leak telegraphs to Tehran that post-summit kinetic option is administratively pre-staged. NBC (not Fox) breaking — anonymous Pentagon-source leak through Democrat-aligned outlet pattern. Combined picture: Vance keeps diplomatic door, Pentagon prepares kinetic option, Trump positions in middle with HEU-via-China lever that doesn't require either Russia or full-rejection. **B3 EIA MAY STEO PUBLISHED MAY 12 — Brent ~$106 May/June, $89 4Q26, $79 2027 average** (CONFIRMED EIA primary; corrects yesterday's TASS $94.85 = calendar-year 2026 average — both correct on different metrics). EIA: Iraq+Saudi+Kuwait+UAE+Qatar+Bahrain collectively shut in 10.5 MMbpd in April; Hormuz effectively closed until late May per assumption; shipping picks up June. Bloomberg picked up EIA separate finding May 13: **Hormuz oil flows fell nearly 30% in Q1 2026** — official-data confirmation of Lloyd's List operational tracker series. EIA $89 4Q26 cuts Goldman-JPM divergence ($85 vs $60) more by trimming Goldman than validating JPM. EIA-Goldman-JPM range ($79-$89-$60) for late-2026/2027 is now most divergent bulge-bracket-plus-official-forecaster spread of cycle. Brent retraced from May 13 close $108.05 to $105.68 May 14 morning — $108-110 trigger zone breach was SINGLE-SESSION, NOT sustained. StanChart $130-145 cascade remains DORMANT. Trinary band ($100-110) has now held through SIX sessions of news escalation = structural durability signal. **A10 REUTERS AMPLIFIES SAUDI-STRIKES STORY** — Reuters May 12-13 cited 'two Western officials and two Iranian officials' (Reuters primary; carried by US News, Spokesman, Times of Israel, Haaretz, Kathmandu Post, Pravda, BusinessWorld). Materially strengthens basis from one-cluster (Newsweek-WSJ) to multi-cluster (WSJ + Reuters as independent primary scoops). Reuters new intelligence: 'Saudi Arabia made Iran aware of the strikes and this was followed by intensive diplomatic engagement and Saudi threats to retaliate further, which led to an understanding between the two countries to de-escalate.' Riyadh-Tehran channel = 'kinetic strikes followed by de-escalation understanding,' structurally different from UAE-Iran (UAE remains fully active third combatant per WSJ). Saudi-Iran/UAE-Iran trajectories BIFURCATING. Saudi/Iran institutionally silent. **A7 IDF ANNOUNCED MAY 13 'WEEKLONG RAID' BEYOND LITANI RIVER NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH led by Golani Brigade's Reconnaissance Unit** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel, JNS, Haaretz). ~15 Hezbollah operatives killed past 24h, ~45 Hezbollah targets total 24h. State Department CONFIRMED primary: **third round US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks Washington May 14-15**, Lebanese delegation Simon Karam, Israeli delegation Ron Dermer, agenda includes 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah' + 'full restoration of Lebanese state authority.' April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires May 15 as talks finish — choreographed. **NEGATIVE-SPACE CHAIN: Day 3 of 7 since May 11 Hodeidah unclaimed explosion; Day 4 of 7 since May 10 Safesea Neha bulk-carrier strike inside Qatari EEZ; Day 9 Project Freedom pause; Day 15 of 21 Russia-HEU-custodian window with NO formal announcement; Day 7 Mojtaba silence; CENTCOM redirect tally unchanged at 61.** Markets: S&P 500 +0.6% to 7,444 / NASDAQ +1.2% to 26,402 / VIX 17.87 (sub-18 on a 1-week-clock-day) — markets explicitly Trump-Xi-summit-pricing. US 10Y 4.48% +0.4% — Fed easing closed on April CPI 3.8%. Defense de-rating: Lockheed -15% MoM, ITA -4.1% MoM = market pricing crisis maturation not escalation. Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~20-25% (DOWN — clock close + Vance softer + HEU-via-China door); extended-economic-warfare ~52-57% (UP modestly — Sledgehammer + IRGC exercise bilateral kinetic-preparedness); negotiated-resolution ~22-27% (UP — China-custodian path explicitly opened, Iran ambassador-to-China scaffolding).

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP DEPARTED FOR BEIJING LATE MAY 12 DECLARING HE 'DOES NOT NEED XI'S HELP' ON IRAN — US WILL WIN 'ONE WAY OR THE OTHER' (CONFIRMED ACTION + RHETORIC); pre-Beijing posture materially HARDER than May 6-10 pulse-test phase; Al Jazeera + NPR led with 'doesn't need Xi' line; PBS NewsHour + CSIS framed both leaders 'intent on keeping Iran war from overshadowing summit' = itself a downgrade from prior Chatham House 'can progress be made on Iran' framing; 12+ US CEOs (Tim Cook, Elon Musk) travelling = trade-and-tariffs centre of gravity. Summit May 14-15 closes 1-week clock window May 14 while Trump in Xi's anteroom — rules out immediate kinetic order but public stance going in is uncompromising not open. **A2 APRIL CPI 3.8% YoY (BLS MAY 12) — THREE-YEAR HIGH, highest since May 2023, +0.6% MoM matching expectations; CORE +2.8% YoY / +0.4% MoM (highest monthly print since Jan 2025); ENERGY contributed >40% of headline gain (+3.8% MoM, +17.9% YoY); GASOLINE +28.4% YoY; SHELTER +0.6%. BLS flagged inflation 'a problem beyond the Iran war impacts.'** S&P 500 -0.29% May 12 to 7,392 (off May 11's 7,412.84 record); NASDAQ followed; US 10Y bid at 4.46% (+5bps); gold +0.8% only despite 3-year-high CPI (real-yield channel competing with safe-haven bid); URA -5.0% (positioning unwind not thesis falsification). First cycle inflation print to fully reflect oil pass-through — closes door on near-term Fed easing. **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury formally signalled prepared secondary sanctions on five Chinese teapot refineries (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); China MOFCOM May 2 issued Prohibition Order under Blocking Rules — FIRST FORMAL CHINESE INVOCATION OF BLOCKING RULES vs US sanctions** (CONFIRMED Treasury primary + MOFCOM order text + Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie corroboration). Sanctions architecture shifting from 'secondary risk' to 'explicit legal collision.' **A10 NEWSWEEK + WSJ + 2 Western officials + 2 Iranian officials: SAUDI ARABIA LAUNCHED SECRET STRIKES AGAINST IRAN IN LATE MARCH ('tit-for-tat retaliation when Saudi was hit') — REPORTED — on top of yesterday's UAE-Lavan WSJ disclosure** (April 8 Mirage 2000-9 strike). Iran has fired >2,800 missiles/drones at UAE territory cumulatively (more than at any other country); one UAE Lavan-response strike reportedly coordinated with Israel. Saudi has not publicly acknowledged; Iran silent; Al Hadath (Saudi) editorial distance on UAE story but silent on Saudi-strikes; US-mainstream amplification slower than UAE-Lavan story (consistent with slow-walking Gulf-ally embarrassment). Gulf-alignment graph requires Saudi to move from 'OPEC+/balancing/underwriter' toward partial kinetic participant. **A13 SOUTH KOREA GOVERNMENT FORMALLY CONFIRMED HMM NAMU MAY 4 EXTERNAL STRIKE — TWO unidentified airborne objects struck stern at ~1 min intervals ('double-tap' drone pattern); mine + torpedo formally ruled out. FM Cho Hyun May 13: 'too early to determine who was responsible,' 'various actors including militias.' PPP opposition publicly criticised government for omitting Iran. Seoul institutionally maintaining 'various actors' hedge.** **A7 IDF GROUND CROSSED LITANI RIVER MAY 12 NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH = FIRST PUBLICLY-ACKNOWLEDGED ISRAELI GROUND CROSSING OF LITANI SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE (CONFIRMED — ToI liveblog).** IDF Chief Eyal Zamir: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' = most senior IDF officer declaring ceasefire dead. CGTN single-source SAM-at-IAF claim still NOT Western-corroborated; remains REPORTED-CLAIMED. **NO 2ND RED SEA INCIDENT (Day 2 of 7 from May 11 Hodeidah, single unclaimed); NO 2ND STRIKE inside Qatari EEZ (Day 3 of 7); PROJECT FREEDOM PAUSE HOLDS Day 8; CENTCOM redirect tally unchanged at 61; NO 5TH DISABLED TANKER. NO TRUMP STRIKE ORDER post-rejection — Situation Room weighed Monday, no action ordered before Beijing departure. NO FORMAL RUSSIA HEU CUSTODIAN ANNOUNCEMENT — May 18 Trump 21-day window from Putin-Araghchi meeting; Day 14 of 21. NO MOJTABA AUDIO/VIDEO — Day 6 silence.** Operationally consistent with US pulling kinetic-decision space into post-Beijing window (May 15-20). Force posture: USS Bush + USS Lincoln on station (2 CSGs), 20+ warships, 200+ aircraft, 15,000 troops; USS Ford westbound; USS Boxer ARG + 11th MEU imminent arrival; George Washington CSG departed Yokosuka May 10 — footprint holding/reinforcing. US source-tone unified on CPI shock (WaPo/NYT/CNN/Fox/WSJ/CNBC/NPR all ran 3.8% straight), split on diplomatic track: CNN/NPR 'life support'; Al Jazeera 'doesn't need Xi' straight; Fox framed Iranian intransigence; WaPo carried Aramco '2027 normalisation' warning; Saudi-strikes disclosure had SOFTER amplification curve (Newsweek primary, ToI/MEE secondary, mainstream US wires lagging). Trump's 'we'll win one way or the other' framing reported but not amplified — neither side selling renewed-strikes as inevitable or attractive.

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP PUBLICLY REJECTED IRAN COUNTER-PROPOSAL — 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE' / 'GARBAGE' / CEASEFIRE 'ON MASSIVE LIFE SUPPORT'; CONVENED WH SITUATION ROOM MAY 11 WITH VANCE/RUBIO/HEGSETH/RATCLIFFE/CAINE/WITKOFF CONSIDERING RENEWED MILITARY ACTION (restart Project Freedom OR strike 'remaining 25%' of designated Iran targets) — NO ORDERS ISSUED; TRUMP CHINA VISIT MAY 14-15 CONFIRMED (departs May 13 afternoon for Beijing summit with Xi, Iran on agenda) — FORCED PAUSE WINDOW exactly when 1-week clock closes May 14; NEW OFAC SANCTIONS WAVE MAY 11-12 (12 entities + 3 individuals, Iran→China oil via IRGC Shaid Purja'fari + Golden Globe Turkey-cover; May 12 designations added Iranian nuclear research with military applications); CENTCOM TALLY 58→61 REDIRECTED + 4 DISABLED HOLDS (3 redirects in 48h = below early-May pace, Project Freedom paused); USS Gerald R. Ford transiting Gibraltar westbound (Day 322, home to Norfolk); USS Boxer ARG + 11th MEU imminent arrival; George Washington CSG departed Yokosuka May 10 — footprint holding/reinforcing despite Ford rotation; Aramco CEO Nasser May 11: 2-5 ships/day Hormuz (DETERIORATED from May 10's ~6/day), 100M bbl/week lost, 880M cumulative, market won't normalize until 2027 if disruption persists past mid-June; VLCC Agios Fanourios I (Iraqi Basra crude bound Vietnam) U-turn back into Gulf of Oman without crossing US blockade line — confidence-collapse signature for compliant non-Iranian VLCCs; WSJ MAY 11 REVELATION: UAE AIR FORCE SECRETLY STRUCK IRAN'S LAVAN ISLAND OIL REFINERY APRIL 8 USING MIRAGE 2000-9 (Washington 'positively received Abu Dhabi's participation') — UAE moves from passive US host to ONLY third country to join US-Israel kinetic operations against Iran; HMM Namu forensics public May 11 — Seoul stopped short of publicly blaming Iran (2 unidentified aerial objects ~1min apart at stern; mine/torpedo ruled out) — creates diplomatic friction with Trump who pre-attributed; Modi May 10-11 Hyderabad seven-appeal address (cut fertilizer 50%, defer gold purchases + foreign travel for 1 year) — first major Indian-government public engagement of cycle. Markets: S&P 500 fresh record close +0.2% / NASDAQ +0.1% / Dow +0.2%; VIX +6.9% to 18.38 (still NOT panic — March peak 32+); 10Y yield 4.41% (+1.1% 1D). US-source tone unified on 'life support,' divergent on blame: WaPo/NPR verbatim, CNN aggressive ('Trump ties himself in knots' / 'frustrated Trump more seriously thinking of restarting'), Fox 'Iran on full readiness' framing intransigence as cause; WSJ getting WH+Gulf intel access (broke Iran HEU terms + UAE Lavan simultaneously); Axios framing 'Iran, China and AI collide in Trump's legacy-defining week.'

recent_signals.headline: CENTCOM PRECISION TALLY MAY 9: 58 COMMERCIAL VESSELS REDIRECTED + 4 IRANIAN-FLAGGED TANKERS DISABLED SINCE APRIL 13 (UPDATED — refines yesterday's >70-tankers-held framing); TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 3/7; TRUMP SOFTENED FROM 'FRIDAY SHOULD RESPOND' TO 'NO DEADLINE / WE'LL SEE WHAT HAPPENS' (UPDATED — material US public-posture softening); RUBIO/WITKOFF/AL-THANI MIAMI MEETING SATURDAY CONFIRMS THREE-CHANNEL ARCHITECTURE (Pakistan public political + Qatar substantive operational via IRGC senior generals + direct Witkoff/Kushner); BULK CARRIER STRUCK 23NM NE OF DOHA SUNDAY MORNING — NO US CENTCOM OPERATIONAL CLAIM (perpetrator UNKNOWN, NOT a US action); BAHRAIN DETAINED 41 ALLEGED IRGC-LINKED INDIVIDUALS (NEW — first major Gulf-state internal action against alleged IRGC network; Bahrain hosts US Fifth Fleet, signals pro-US-aligned-counter-IRGC posture). CENTCOM blockade footprint 20+ warships, 200+ aircraft, 15,000 troops UNCHANGED. The 4 disabled tankers: M/T Hasna May 7, M/T Sea Star III + M/T Sevda May 8, 4th identity not publicly disclosed. Operational tempo elevated: 4 disabled tankers in 4 days = 4x acceleration vs prior 24 days. Trump at Lincoln Memorial Saturday: 'talks going very well, but they have to understand — if it doesn't get signed, they're going to have a lot of pain'; separately 'no deadline... never a deadline.' Per Axios primary scoop: 'Qataris functioning as one of at least three back channels' and 'using contacts with senior IRGC generals involved in Iran's decision-making.' US, Indian, most Western European markets CLOSED Sunday — Friday May 8 closes still operative.
sources: Times of Israel May 9-10 live blogs
UKMTO Warning notice (bulk carrier near Doha)
recent_signals.verification: CENTCOM 58/4 tally = CONFIRMED ACTION (CENTCOM primary, multi-source); Trump no-deadline softening = CONFIRMED RHETORIC multi-source primary; Qatar back-channel emergence = REPORTED via Axios primary scoop multi-corroborated; Bulk carrier near Doha = CONFIRMED ACTION (UKMTO primary, multi-source) but perpetrator UNKNOWN — no US/Israeli operational claim suggests NOT a US action; Bahrain 41 detentions = CONFIRMED ACTION (Bahrain MoI primary, multi-source)

recent_signals.headline: CENTCOM DISCLOSED >70-TANKER BLOCKADE SCALE + SECOND DAY OF TANKER STRIKES (M/T SEA STAR III + M/T SEVDA, MAY 8); TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK NOW DAY 2/7; SOFT FRIDAY DEADLINE PASSED WITHOUT FORMAL IRANIAN RESPONSE; TRUMP PUBLICLY ENDORSED PAKISTAN MEDIATION + DISCLOSED PAKISTAN ASKED US 'NOT TO MILITARILY ENGAGE IRAN'; CNN/KVIA CARRIED FIRST PUBLIC US INTEL ASSESSMENT ON MOJTABA ('SHAPING STRATEGY OUT OF PUBLIC VIEW'); SAUDI PUBLICLY DENIED WSJ OFFENSIVE-AIRSPACE-LIFT SCOOP VIA AL-HADATH. Rubio Friday: Iran 'should' deliver answer; Trump 'we'll see what happens.' Trump Truth Social May 8: 'we'll knock them out a lot harder, and a lot more violently, in the future, if they don't get their Deal signed, FAST.' US Navy F/A-18 from USS George H.W. Bush disabled M/T Sea Star III + M/T Sevda May 8 (precision-munition into smokestacks, attempting to break US blockade entering Iranian ports). CENTCOM disclosed '20 warships stocked with over 200 aircraft and 15,000 troops' enforcing the 70+ tanker blockade — 'fully in effect.' Iran claimed counter-seizure of unidentified tanker in Gulf of Oman. Trump publicly thanked Pakistan civilian and military leadership for mediation; revealed Pakistan 'asked the United States not to militarily engage Iran during negotiations to end their war' — first public Trump description of Pakistan as active diplomatic constraint on US military operations. CNN/KVIA US intel assessment: Mojtaba alive 'shaping strategy' but injured and 'out of public view' — operates against Pezeshkian same-day public claim of 2.5-hour face-to-face meeting. Saudi via Al-Hadath: 'Kingdom did not allow the use of its airspace to support offensive military operations,' supporting 'Pakistan's efforts to broker a peace agreement.' Markets: S&P 500 record close +0.84%, Nasdaq +2.35%, VIX 17.08 cycle-low; Brent close $101.73 (+1.66% 1D, range $96-$104).
sources: CNN (1,500 vessels + US intel Mojtaba assessment)
recent_signals.verification: CENTCOM tanker disabling + 70-tanker blockade scale = CONFIRMED ACTION (CENTCOM primary, multi-source); Trump Friday deadline pulse-test + Truth Social warning = CONFIRMED RHETORIC; Trump-Pakistan diplomatic-constraint disclosure = CONFIRMED RHETORIC/SIGNAL (Trump primary, Pakistan Today multi-source); US intel Mojtaba assessment = REPORTED (CNN/KVIA citing US intel community); Saudi public denial via Al-Hadath = CONFIRMED DIPLOMATIC SIGNAL on the record (sharper than yesterday's WSJ-scoop framing)

recent_signals.headline: 14-POINT MOU SUBSTANTIVE TEXT CIRCULATING — 48-HR IRAN RESPONSE WINDOW (~MAY 8 EVENING). Witkoff+Kushner negotiating directly with Iran AND via Pakistani mediators. MOU provisions: end-of-war declaration; 12-15 yr Iran enrichment moratorium (compromise from US-20yr/Iran-5yr); Iran ships out HEU stockpile (custodian TBD); US lifts sanctions and frozen assets; BOTH sides lift Hormuz blockades; 30-day post-signing detail window. CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile in Hormuz; CBS attribution to Iran (single-source US officials, IRGC has NOT claimed). France Charles de Gaulle CSG transits Suez to Red Sea/Gulf of Aden — first European naval shift of cycle. Vali Nasr (Bloomberg/DAWN) challenges Trump as 'overclaimed.'
recent_signals.verification: MOU framework = REPORTED (Axios scoop multi-corroborated, final text not published); Trump bombing warning = CONFIRMED RHETORIC/THREAT; CMA CGM strike = CONFIRMED action, CLAIMED Iran attribution; French CSG deployment = CONFIRMED (French armed forces primary)
